subtitle.text: Dragon Breath and Chorus Fruit are End's Delight ingredients. Stockpile now. Ch14 needs both in bulk.

description: CH.13 · END'S DELIGHT PREVIEW
▸ End's Delight is the End-dimension food mod.
Its recipes use materials exclusive to the End.
Dragon Breath is a primary ingredient in several dishes.
Popped Chorus Fruit is a secondary ingredient in others.
Both are farmable from Ch13 content.
The full End's Delight system unlocks in Ch14.
Build the stockpile now.
◈ DRAGON BREATH FARMING
└ Collect with glass bottle during Dragon's breath attack:
Right-click the breath cloud while holding empty bottle
└ Yields: 1 Dragon Breath per bottle per cloud
(breath clouds persist 30+ seconds — farm multiple bottles)
└ Re-summon farming: same fight, unlimited Dragon Breath runs
└ Target: 64+ Dragon Breath before Ch14
End's Delight uses it in multiple recipes
└ Storage: Dragon Breath stacks to 64 in bottles
◈ POPPED CHORUS FRUIT FARMING
└ Smelt Chorus Fruit → Popped Chorus Fruit (1:1 ratio)
└ Furnace or smoker (smoker = 2× speed)
└ Uses in End's Delight: binding ingredient in End cuisine
└ Uses in base game: Purpur Block crafting, End Rod crafting
└ Chorus farm from Ch13 feeds directly into this pipeline
(see Chorus Farm quest — link your farm to a connected smoker)
◈ WHAT END'S DELIGHT DOES
└ Full mod overview unlocks in Ch14
└ Short version: Dragon Egg Research mechanic —
use the Dragon Egg as a research trigger to unlock
all dragon-tier food recipes in the mod
└ Dragon-based foods: some of the best stat meals in the pack
(combat healing, saturation, effect buffs)
└ Do NOT smelt the Dragon Egg
It is a research item, not a food ingredient
▸ The civilizations in the End did not eat the dragon.
They cooked with what it left behind.
The breath. The bone. The crystals.
The dragon was not prey.
It was a kitchen ingredient that fought back.
They cooked around that detail.
▶ Collect 16 Dragon Breath
▶ Collect 16 Popped Chorus Fruit
◇ Ch14 (What the Void Remembers) opens the full
End's Delight system including Dragon Egg Research.
Your dragon breath and chorus stockpile is the fuel.
Build both farms before leaving Ch13.
